name: Western Blot Primary Antibody Diluent

usage.en: Primary antibody diluent for Western blot. Contains BSA and sodium azide — do NOT use for HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies.
usage.zh: Western Blot 一抗稀释液。含 BSA 和叠氮钠——不可用于稀释 HRP 标记二抗。

storage.notes: Store at 4°C for lab sharing. Azide prevents microbial growth.

components.name: 30% BSA stock
components.note: Prepare or purchase as stock solution

components.name: 5% Sodium azide stock
components.note: Prepare or purchase as stock solution

prepSteps.step: Add TBST to a clean bottle.
Add 30% BSA stock (16.7 mL per 100 mL for 5% final) and mix.
Add 5% sodium azide stock (1 mL per 100 mL for 0.05% final).

notes.en: Azide inhibits HRP enzyme — NEVER dilute HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies in this solution. Use TBST + 5% milk for secondary antibody dilution instead.
notes.zh: 叠氮钠会抑制 HRP——绝对不要用此液稀释 HRP 标记二抗。二抗用 TBST + 5% 脱脂奶粉稀释。

ref: Cell Signaling Technology Western Blotting Protocol; Bhatt et al. Methods Mol Biol (2012)
